'''âl-v-b-d''' ('''kalavbedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaticinate|vaticinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaticinate|vaticinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-b-d
|-
! Lemma
| kalavbedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
